---
title: "January Goals + Dailies"
author: "Megan Ewing"
date: "01-05-2026"
categories: goals, daily
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

## January Goals

-   Finish revisions on Ch 2 (clam chapter)

-   Have near-finalized results for Ch 1 (gmt)

-   Develop a more concrete plan for bypass project

## January Dailies

### Jan 5

First day of 270, 270 planning meeting. Get meeting w steven in the books and churn through some of the clam chapter comments.
